site.name: Adam & Eve
site.platform_details: Proprietary ASP.NET e-commerce platform with inline JavaScript configuration (phe.config), server-side rendering, HawkSearch integration for search/recommendations, and extensive dataLayer product data. Uses .aspx URL extensions.
site.mechanism_justification: Direct HTTP requests work without any anti-bot protection. Product pages are server-rendered with rich product data available in Open Graph meta tags, inline serverSideEvents JavaScript objects, and HTML DOM. No JavaScript rendering is needed.

anti_bot.details: No anti-bot protection detected. Direct HTTP access returns full page content. Uses OneTrust for cookie consent (compliance, not anti-bot). Has ASP.NET anti-forgery tokens for form submissions but not for page reads.

connectivity.notes: Direct HTTP connection works perfectly. No proxy needed. No JavaScript rendering required. Page content is fully server-rendered.

primary_sources.description: Open Graph meta tags contain price (og:price:amount), currency (og:price:currency), brand (og:brand), availability (og:availability), title, description, and product image URL.

Inline JavaScript serverSideEvents array contains structured product data: Sku, ProductName, Price, Brand, Colors, Sizes, stock_status (dimension7), category path, product ID (dimension1), subcategory (dimension2), star rating (metric2), review count (metric4).
Server-rendered HTML DOM contains product name, price, images, description, variants/colors, sizes, reviews, and breadcrumb navigation.

key_selectors.serverSideEvents: script: serverSideEvents variable in inline JS

product_discovery.url_pattern_notes: Product URLs follow the pattern: /{category}/{subcategory}/{sub-subcategory}/{sp-prefix}-{slug}-{numeric-id}.aspx. The numeric ID before .aspx is the product identifier. The 'sp-' prefix appears on all product slugs. Categories form a hierarchical path (e.g., /lingerie/womens-wear/baby-dolls/).
product_discovery.product_id_pattern: Numeric ID at end of URL before .aspx (e.g., 91407). Also has internal SKU code like '143H' available in dataLayer.

rate_limiting.justification: No anti-bot protection detected, but being a large retail site with standard ASP.NET infrastructure, moderate delays (1-2 seconds) are prudent to avoid triggering any server-side rate limits.
